case_title: YUCEL, NIL et al VS ASSALI, ROBIN

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ASSALI, ROBIN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YUCEL, NIL HABELITZ, STEFAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ASSALI, ROBIN RESPON. HAS NO RIGHT TO ATTYS' FEES UNDER SF RENT CONTROL ORDINANCE. SEE SFRESID. RENT STAB & ARB BD AT050218 (9/20/05);TURA VS JAMISON, SF SUP CT 502423 (8/26/03) THE CONTRACT DOES NOT CREATE A SEPARATE RIGHT, INDEPENDENT OF STATUTE, WHERE THE PROCEEDING IS ONLY A PROCEDURAL PREREQUISITE TO DETERMINE THE MANNER IN WHICH RENT MAY BE RAISED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,438.95 FILED BY YUCEL, NIL HABELITZ, STEFAN AS TO DEFENDANT ASSALI, ROBIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
